chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No. S- 13 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of Bail Application 13-02-2023 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, Advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press this Crl. Bail Application; however, seeks direction to the trial Court to conclude the trial within a period of two months. Learned Additional P.G for the State submits that expeditious trial is a right of an accused. Accordingly, instant Crl. Bail Application stands dismissed as not pressed by directing the trial Court to conclude the trial preferably within a period of two months hereof. JUDGE Ahmad
